subject: Project Management
title: The Future of Sequential Development
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Future of Sequential Development.

hook.text: Waterfall isn't dying. It's evolving — adapting to new realities while keeping its core strength: structured planning.

buildup.text: AI-assisted requirements analysis, automated testing, and digital twins are modernizing waterfall's phases.

discovery.text: In construction, BIM (Building Information Modeling) makes waterfall's design phase dramatically more effective.

twist.text: The future isn't waterfall vs agile — it's intelligent blending based on project risk and domain constraints.

climax.text: Sequential thinking will always have a place. How much sequence and how much iteration — that's the real question.

punchline.text: Waterfall isn't dead. It just learned to share the river.

quiz.question: What is the future of waterfall methodology?
options: Intelligent blending with agile based on project context and risk
No changes — waterfall will stay exactly the same
